title: Na Sikkip In Hong Lenzo Diam?

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Na sikkip in hong lenkipzo na diam?
Huihpi hong nun ciang a muanhuai diam?
Meivom kai
ciangin tuihual khang ciangin
Hong lenkip zo diam? Na sikkip in.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Nuntakna hong
len sikkip i nei,
Tuihual khan ciang zong launa’ng om kei
A kip suangpi tung khotak khih
in,
Honpa itna sungah thukpi phum in.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Huihpi nangzo ding kiptak kikhih
hi,
Honpa’ khut in hong lung muangsak hi;
Ama lungtang pan, kei lungsim sungah,
Huihpi
nan zawh na’ng hatna ka ngah.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Lauhuaina sungah hong lenkip ding hi,
Siat
theihna hong nai i thei khol hi;
Huihsia hong nungin, tui kilok taleh,
Tuihual in hong tumzo ngei
ke’n teh.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Hong lenkip ding hi, sihna tuihual sung,
Husan beidek dong huihsia
hong nung;
Tuihual a hat hang i liing kei ding hi,
A kimulo lam-etna i nei.

sections.label: Verse 5
lines: Zan
khuamial sung pan i gal-et ciangin,
Tembaw khawl mun tang kigalmuh khin;
Huihpi venna mun, vantung
gun piau ah,
I sikkip khia ni, kiptak in-ah.
